programme.desc: Charlie tries to cheer up an ailing Lola, but has promised Marv that he will play football with him(n)

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: When Mo wakes up with a cold, who s there to take over mum duties? Tee of course!(n)

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Small Clanger is fishing in the music boat and catches a beautiful silver seed(n)

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: Makka Pakka discovers he can make musical notes by tapping different stones. He makes up a tune, which everyone hears and comes to listen to Makka's stone concert. Derek Jacobi narrates(n)

programme.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: Laura Haddock reads The Weather Girls, by Delphine Mach(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Naga Munchetty present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: BBC News at 9
programme.desc: The latest on the coronavirus pandemic, focusing on the latest measure taken in the UK and around the world(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell follow the progress of property developments in Plymouth, Treherbert in Wales and Hinckley in Leicestershire that all turn out to take much longer than planned, threatening to prevent their new owners making money(n)

programme.title: Claimed and Shamed
programme.desc: When flooding hits a business, the owner goes to extraordinary lengths to try to rubber stamp her claim. A dog owner displays very bad behaviour when it comes to their pet's insurance policy, while there's a backlash over a whiplash case when footage emerges of the claimant in very fine health indeed. Narrated by Naga Munchetty(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams at the Peterborough Festival of Antiques find themselves in the capable hands of experts Stephanie Connell and Philip Serrell, trying to bag items they can make a profit on at auction. As well as monitoring proceedings, presenter Eric Knowles has an intriguing mystery to solve(n)

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales(n)

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Julia supports Jimmi as he struggles with life after prison. Later, she unexpectedly offers him a way out of Letherbridge, but whether he will accept it remains to be seen(n)

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: A manipulative murderer strikes too close to home for the squad's comfort. With Billie stabbed and her attacker on the loose, Vivienne blames herself for not recognising that she was in danger. As the team scrambles to track down Amber, they discover that there's more to her than meets the eye. Detective drama, starring Bailey Patrick, Tori Allen-Martin, Sharon Small and Hugo Speer(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a couple fulfil a long-held dream of moving to the Scottish countryside of Ayrshire. Alongside a selection of the region's best properties that a budget of £450,000 can buy, Nicki also pays a visit to the 18th-century Dumfries House, home to one of the finest collections of furniture in the world(n)

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore searches for tired and unwanted items at Woking Recycling Centre in Surrey she can transform from skip-bound to stylish. With three items saved, Sarah turns to upholsterer Sharon O'Connor to overhaul an old chair frame, while upcycler Jacqui Joseph attempts to transform a dated desk. Sarah's challenge is to update a set of four chairs. Narrated by Arthur Smith(n)

programme.title: Ready Steady Cook
programme.desc: Siblings from Wolverhampton are paired with chefs Ellis Barrie and Romy Gill. Sommer and Daryl's large family gatherings revolve around shared meals and they were both taught to cook by their grandmother, who cheers them on from the audience. Fiercely competitive, Sommer intends to beat her little brother, but Daryl is determined he can get the better of his sister. Rylan Clark-Neal hosts(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Matt Baker present the usual mix of celebrity guests and stories about people in extraordinary circumstances(n)

programme.title: Weatherman Walking
programme.desc: Derek Brockway treks from Harlech to Barmouth, stripping down to basics as he crosses a nudist beach in Gwynedd. On this walk along one of Wales' most popular coastlines, Derek also rolls a cheese down the world's steepest hill and learns about the 'Devil in the Shawl' when he visits an old village chapel. Along his journey, he nearly gets caught out on a tidal causeway and meets a team of women who give up their free time to keep the beaches clean and safe for wildlife(n)

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Gary decides to join the dating scene so he can bring someone along to Stevie's birthday party, prompting Miranda to do the same. Are the two of them destined to find romance in the arms of strangers - or with each other? Meanwhile, the shop owner can't hide her embarrassment when Penny decides to run for local councillor. Comedy, starring Miranda Hart, Tom Ellis and Patricia Hodge(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: Ex-Manchester United defender Gary Pallister, former WBC World Super-Middleweight champion Richie Woodhall, Olympic gold medal-winning hockey player Jane Sixsmith, and former sprinter Tony Jarrett join team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell and host Sue Barker on the quiz(n)

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Six heat winners return for the quarter-final, fighting for a place in Knockout Week. Facing the Critic's Test, the week's best-performing amateurs take on an intimidating task - cooking to a brief set by food writer Jimi Famurewa, who asks for a dish inspired by flavours of the sweet shop. Presented by John Torode and Gregg Wallace(n)

programme.title: Peter Kay's Comedy Shuffle
programme.desc: A further collection of clips documenting the much-loved comedy star's best work from his decades in showbusiness. Featuring a special appearance by The One Show's Alex Jones(n)

programme.title: Rhod Gilbert's Work Experience
programme.desc: The comedian joins the ranks of an airline cabin crew, a job that requires service with a smile - something that simply does not come naturally to Rhod. How will the long-haul passengers cope with his elbow-crunching trolley driving and miserable approach to customer service?(n)

programme.title: Young, Welsh and Pretty Minted
programme.desc: In west Wales 19-year-old forex trader Ash persuades YouTube star Gonth to join him in a new business venture. Utilising Ash's knowledge and Gonth's 1.7million fans, they launching a subscription-only webinar offering advice on how to dabble in the forex market. Elsewhere, Twitch streamer Rage Darling wows her fans at Ragecon and world champion Dan Huxtable opens Wales' largest kickboxing club(n)

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: A Philadelphia cop is assigned to protect an Amish boy who was the only witness to a murder. Discovering the killers are rogue policemen willing to go to any lengths to cover up their crime, he is forced to go into hiding within the Amish community, experiencing a clash of cultures and unexpected feelings for the boy's widowed mother. Thriller, directed by Peter Weir, with Harrison Ford, Kelly McGillis, Lukas Haas and Danny Glover(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Naga Munchetty present national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features. Including NewsWatch at 7.45(n)

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chef Paul Ainsworth, and special guest Michelle Keegan faces her food heaven or hell. Plus, archive clips from Rick Stein and Keith Floyd(n)

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites
programme.desc: Former Great British Bake Off winner Nadiya Hussain demonstrates dishes for those times when it seems there is nothing in the house to eat, using leftovers and kitchen cupboard staples to make fruit salad fattoush, ginger rice with spicy chickpeas, avocado pasta with peas and mint, and carrot cake pakoras with a cream cheese dip. Meanwhile, her quest to find the best home-made pasta in Britain takes her to Derby, and her love of all things spicy lands her in a herb garden with spice expert Roopa(n)

programme.title: Football Focus
programme.desc: Dan Walker and guests review the week's headlines, plus, interviews with some of the leading names in the game and features on teams from all levels of football(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams are challenged to scour an antiques fair and pick up bargains to sell for profit at auction(n)

programme.title: Ready Steady Cook
programme.desc: Anna Haugh and Romy Gill create a meal in 20 minutes using ingredients provided by two sisters, one of whom has ulcerative colitis, which places limitations on her diet(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, featuring all the goals, analysis of the main talking points and post-match reaction from managers and players(n)

programme.title: Madly Madagascar
programme.desc: Love is in the air and adventures abound as Valentine's Day, the most romantic date on the calendar, arrives for the crew at the zoo. Animated spin-off from the Madagascar franchise, featuring the voices of Ben Stiller, Jada Pinkett Smith, Chris Rock and David Schwimmer(n)

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa (2008)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals discover a plane and, following a swift repair job by the penguins, manage to escape the desolate shores of Madagascar. However, they crash-land on the plains of Africa and find themselves face-to-face with their wild counterparts for the first time. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: Brave (2012)
programme.desc: A princess defies her mother's plans to secure peace by marrying her off to the son of one of their allies. A witch provides the rebellious royal with a magic spell to change her fate, but the enchantment backfires disastrously when the queen is transformed into a bear. Pixar's animated fantasy, with the voices of Kelly Macdonald, Emma Thompson and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: Catchpoint
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness hosts a family-friendly game show combining physical fun and an exciting question mechanic, as contestants have to think fast as they answer questions while trying to catch balls of various sizes dropped from the studio ceiling, with a variety of entertaining rounds and a cash prize at stake(n)

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present as famous faces take part in the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. Contestants include Kelly Cates, Adrian Chiles, Andy Hamilton, Kate Williams, Mark Dolan, Rustie Lee, Esther Rantzen and Tim Vine(n)

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Charlie has finally had enough and makes his feelings known about Jade and Jacob. Meanwhile, Ruby is forced to question her decision to give Harmony to her parents, but supportive words from Jan make her realise she has made the right choice, and Lev struggles to cope with Luka's chemotherapy. Starring Derek Thompson and Uriel Emil(n)

programme.title: All Round to Mrs Brown's
programme.desc: Mrs Brown's Boys creator, writer and star Brendan O'Carroll dons Agnes's famous cardigan and curly wig once again as he throws open the doors of the larger-than-life Irish matriarch's home to host the Saturday night chat show. In the second episode of the series, Agnes and the family are joined on the show by comedian and actor Lee Mack, actress and star of Silent Witness Emilia Fox and her mother, the actress Joanna David. Plus, a musical performance from the legendary singer-songwriter, Billy Ocean(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, featuring all the goals, analysis of the main talking points and post-match reaction from managers and players(n)

programme.title: Extras
programme.desc: David Bowie offers some home truths to Andy as he finally realises his dream of TV success. However, it soon becomes apparent to the former background artist that fame comes at a price and he is devastated to learn that stardom is not quite how he expected it to be. Starring Ricky Gervais and Ashley Jensen(n)

programme.title: Extras
programme.desc: Hoping to gain himself greater acting credibility, Andy takes a role in A Month of Summers, a play directed by Ian McKellen. However, he is shocked to discover the specifics of the production's plot. Meanwhile, Andy's agent Darren decides to ask Maggie out on a date, but things do not go to plan. Starring Ricky Gervais, Ashley Jensen and Stephen Merchant(n)

programme.title: Old School (2003)
programme.desc: An embittered lawyer decides to relive the wild, crazy days of his youth after his girlfriend is unfaithful, and enlists the help of two equally disillusioned friends in setting up a fraternity house next to his former college campus. Comedy, starring Luke Wilson, Will Ferrell, Vince Vaughn and Juliette Lewis(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger Johnson and Nina Warhurst present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: The Andrew Marr Show
programme.desc: A round-up of the week's stories, featuring interviews with key figures in politics and current affairs and a round-up of the Sunday papers. Including news and weather at 10.00(n)

programme.title: Politics Wales
programme.desc: The latest political news from Wales and beyond, presented by Arwyn Jones(n)

programme.title: The Big Questions
programme.desc: Nicky Campbell presents moral and religious discussions on topical issues, with contributions by members of the audience at Hutchesons' Grammar School in Glasgow(n)

programme.title: Sunday Worship
programme.desc: The Very Rev Kathy Jones leads a service for Passion Sunday from Bangor Cathedral in north Wales. With hymns sung by a Songs of Praise congregation recorded in March 2018(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell casts her eye over a two-bed flat in Battersea. Martin Roberts visits a linked-detached house in Winsford, Cheshire, and a property in Stourbridge, West Midlands(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones speaks to Archbishop of York designate the Rt Rev Stephen Cottrell about the Christian hope that can still be found despite the current troubled times. Aled also refelcts on recent editions of the programme in which he met those whose faith saw them through especially challenging times - inlcuding a woman who survived the Grenfell Tower tragedy, and a Second World War veteran inolved in the D-Day landings(n)

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: An appeal for funds on behalf of a registered charity(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: City-dwelling families, couples and individuals set out to find their ideal rural retreats with the help of a property expert(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman is joined by studio guests to review the day's Premier League action(n)

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: Weatherman Walking
programme.desc: Derek Brockway treks from Harlech to Barmouth, stripping down to basics as he crosses a nudist beach in Gwynedd. On this walk along one of Wales' most popular coastlines, Derek also rolls a cheese down the world's steepest hill and learns about the 'Devil in the Shawl' when he visits an old village chapel. Along his journey, he nearly gets caught out on a tidal causeway and meets a team of women who give up their free time to keep the beaches clean and safe for wildlife(n)

programme.title: Blue Planet Revisited
programme.desc: In the first of two programmes, Steve Backshall discovers why the Bahamas provide a sanctuary for sharks, looking at the protection offered to them, people's changing attitudes and the key role science plays in their conservation. He joins researchers who have dedicated their lives to this unique and often misunderstood group of animals and learns that a healthy shark population is absolutely vital to a healthy marine ecosystem(n)

programme.title: The Snow Spider
programme.desc: On his ninth birthday, Gwyn Griffiths' grandmother bestows him with five special gifts infused with ancient Welsh magic. Following her instructions, he climbs the snowy Pendewi mountains where his sister Bethan went missing and is amazed to discover the luminous Snow Spider. Children's fantasy drama based on Jenny Nimmo's trilogy, starring Fflyn Edwards(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Ellie Harrison visits the Lugg Valley in Herefordshire to hunt for signs of spring, joining volunteers making sure toads can make it safely across main roads to their favoured spawning grounds. She also meets people who have just planted out their first forest garden and chats to an artist who sees the beauty in the flooded landscape(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return for a second visit to Morden Hall Park in South London, where items include letters written by Mother Teresa and a bronze by South African sculptor Anton Van Wouw. There is also a colourful collage by celebrated British artist and illustrator John Minton, and a huge collection of intricately designed silver vinaigrette boxes(n)

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: Three months have passed and Kaya is living with Dan and Emily and enjoying her new lifestyle, but James has his reservations and is concerned that she is being exploited. Souter is suspicious Kaya's background doesn't quite check out and is having to field questions from young and ambitious journalist Eleanor. At home tensions between the couple and their surrogate are at breaking point, and Dan questions what he really knows about the teenager he has invited into his home. Thriller, starring Martin Compston, Sophie Rundle and Mirren Mack(n)

programme.title: Rain Man (1988)
programme.desc: Brash yuppie car dealer Charlie discovers his deceased father has left the family fortune to Raymond, the autistic elder brother he never knew he had. In a bid to get his hands on the money, he tracks down and abducts Raymond - but the ensuing cross-country journey proves to be a profound learning experience. Oscar-winning drama, starring Tom Cruise and Dustin Hoffman, with Valeria Golino, Gerald R Molen and Jack Murdock(n)

programme.desc: The Very Rev Kathy Jones leads a service for Passion Sunday from Bangor Cathedral in north Wales. With hymns sung by a Songs of Praise congregation recorded in March 2018(n)

programme.desc: Martel Maxwell casts her eye over a two-bed flat in Battersea. Martin Roberts visits a linked-detached house in Winsford, Cheshire, and a property in Stourbridge, West Midlands(n)

programme.desc: Aled Jones speaks to Archbishop of York designate the Rt Rev Stephen Cottrell about the Christian hope that can still be found despite the current troubled times. programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: Ready Steady Cook
programme.desc: Siblings from Wolverhampton are paired with chefs Ellis Barrie and Romy Gill. Sommer and Daryl's large family gatherings revolve around shared meals and they were both taught to cook by their grandmother, who cheers them on from the audience. Fiercely competitive, Sommer intends to beat her little brother, but Daryl is determined he can get the better of his sister. Rylan Clark-Neal hosts(n)

programme.title: Blue Planet Revisited
programme.desc: In the first of two programmes, Steve Backshall discovers why the Bahamas provide a sanctuary for sharks, looking at the protection offered to them, people's changing attitudes and the key role science plays in their conservation. He joins researchers who have dedicated their lives to this unique and often misunderstood group of animals and learns that a healthy shark population is absolutely vital to a healthy marine ecosystem(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Ellie Harrison visits the Lugg Valley in Herefordshire to hunt for signs of spring, joining volunteers making sure toads can make it safely across main roads to their favoured spawning grounds. She also meets people who have just planted out their first forest garden and chats to an artist who sees the beauty in the flooded landscape(n)

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return for a second visit to Morden Hall Park in South London, where items include letters written by Mother Teresa and a bronze by South African sculptor Anton Van Wouw. There is also a colourful collage by celebrated British artist and illustrator John Minton, and a huge collection of intricately designed silver vinaigrette boxes(n)

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: Three months have passed and Kaya is living with Dan and Emily and enjoying her new lifestyle, but James has his reservations and is concerned that she is being exploited. Souter is suspicious Kaya's background doesn't quite check out and is having to field questions from young and ambitious journalist Eleanor. At home tensions between the couple and their surrogate are at breaking point, and Dan questions what he really knows about the teenager he has invited into his home. Thriller, starring Martin Compston, Sophie Rundle and Mirren Mack(n)

programme.title: Rain Man (1988)
programme.desc: Brash yuppie car dealer Charlie discovers his deceased father has left the family fortune to Raymond, the autistic elder brother he never knew he had. In a bid to get his hands on the money, he tracks down and abducts Raymond - but the ensuing cross-country journey proves to be a profound learning experience. Oscar-winning drama, starring Tom Cruise and Dustin Hoffman, with Valeria Golino, Gerald R Molen and Jack Murdock(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Naga Munchetty present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: BBC News at 9
programme.desc: The latest on the coronavirus pandemic, focusing on the latest measure taken in the UK and around the world(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell follow the progress of property developments in Plymouth, Treherbert in Wales and Hinckley in Leicestershire that all turn out to take much longer than planned, threatening to prevent their new owners making money(n)

programme.title: Claimed and Shamed
programme.desc: When flooding hits a business, the owner goes to extraordinary lengths to try to rubber stamp her claim. A dog owner displays very bad behaviour when it comes to their pet's insurance policy, while there's a backlash over a whiplash case when footage emerges of the claimant in very fine health indeed. Narrated by Naga Munchetty(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams at the Peterborough Festival of Antiques find themselves in the capable hands of experts Stephanie Connell and Philip Serrell, trying to bag items they can make a profit on at auction. As well as monitoring proceedings, presenter Eric Knowles has an intriguing mystery to solve(n)

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland(n)

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Julia supports Jimmi as he struggles with life after prison. Later, she unexpectedly offers him a way out of Letherbridge, but whether he will accept it remains to be seen(n)

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: A manipulative murderer strikes too close to home for the squad's comfort. With Billie stabbed and her attacker on the loose, Vivienne blames herself for not recognising that she was in danger. As the team scrambles to track down Amber, they discover that there's more to her than meets the eye. Detective drama, starring Bailey Patrick, Tori Allen-Martin, Sharon Small and Hugo Speer(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps a couple fulfil a long-held dream of moving to the Scottish countryside of Ayrshire. Alongside a selection of the region's best properties that a budget of £450,000 can buy, Nicki also pays a visit to the 18th-century Dumfries House, home to one of the finest collections of furniture in the world(n)

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore searches for tired and unwanted items at Woking Recycling Centre in Surrey she can transform from skip-bound to stylish. With three items saved, Sarah turns to upholsterer Sharon O'Connor to overhaul an old chair frame, while upcycler Jacqui Joseph attempts to transform a dated desk. Sarah's challenge is to update a set of four chairs. Narrated by Arthur Smith(n)

programme.title: Ready Steady Cook
programme.desc: Siblings from Wolverhampton are paired with chefs Ellis Barrie and Romy Gill. Sommer and Daryl's large family gatherings revolve around shared meals and they were both taught to cook by their grandmother, who cheers them on from the audience. Fiercely competitive, Sommer intends to beat her little brother, but Daryl is determined he can get the better of his sister. Rylan Clark-Neal hosts(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Matt Baker present the usual mix of celebrity guests and stories about people in extraordinary circumstances(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: Ex-Manchester United defender Gary Pallister, former WBC World Super-Middleweight champion Richie Woodhall, Olympic gold medal-winning hockey player Jane Sixsmith, and former sprinter Tony Jarrett join team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell and host Sue Barker on the quiz(n)

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Gary decides to join the dating scene so he can bring someone along to Stevie's birthday party, prompting Miranda to do the same. Are the two of them destined to find romance in the arms of strangers - or with each other? Meanwhile, the shop owner can't hide her embarrassment when Penny decides to run for local councillor. Comedy, starring Miranda Hart, Tom Ellis and Patricia Hodge(n)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Actress Olivia Colman, JLS member Aston Merrygold, comedian Jon Richardson and wildlife presenter Michaela Strachan join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As ever, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory(n)

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Six heat winners return for the quarter-final, fighting for a place in Knockout Week. Facing the Critic's Test, the week's best-performing amateurs take on an intimidating task - cooking to a brief set by food writer Jimi Famurewa, who asks for a dish inspired by flavours of the sweet shop. Presented by John Torode and Gregg Wallace(n)

programme.title: Peter Kay's Comedy Shuffle
programme.desc: A further collection of clips documenting the much-loved comedy star's best work from his decades in showbusiness. Featuring a special appearance by The One Show's Alex Jones(n)

programme.title: Witness (1985)
programme.desc: A Philadelphia cop is assigned to protect an Amish boy who was the only witness to a murder. Discovering the killers are rogue policemen willing to go to any lengths to cover up their crime, he is forced to go into hiding within the Amish community, experiencing a clash of cultures and unexpected feelings for the boy's widowed mother. Thriller, directed by Peter Weir, with Harrison Ford, Kelly McGillis, Lukas Haas and Danny Glover(n)

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: A manipulative murderer strikes too close to home for the squad's comfort. With Billie stabbed and her attacker on the loose, Vivienne blames herself for not recognising that she was in danger. As the team scrambles to track down Amber, they discover that there's more to her than meets the eye. Detective drama, starring Bailey Patrick, Tori Allen-Martin, Sharon Small and Hugo Speer(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Charlie Stayt and Naga Munchetty present national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features. Including NewsWatch at 7.45(n)

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chef Paul Ainsworth, and special guest Michelle Keegan faces her food heaven or hell. Plus, archive clips from Rick Stein and Keith Floyd(n)

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites
programme.desc: Former Great British Bake Off winner Nadiya Hussain demonstrates dishes for those times when it seems there is nothing in the house to eat, using leftovers and kitchen cupboard staples to make fruit salad fattoush, ginger rice with spicy chickpeas, avocado pasta with peas and mint, and carrot cake pakoras with a cream cheese dip. Meanwhile, her quest to find the best home-made pasta in Britain takes her to Derby, and her love of all things spicy lands her in a herb garden with spice expert Roopa(n)

programme.title: Football Focus
programme.desc: Dan Walker and guests review the week's headlines, plus, interviews with some of the leading names in the game and features on teams from all levels of football(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams are challenged to scour an antiques fair and pick up bargains to sell for profit at auction(n)

programme.title: Ready Steady Cook
programme.desc: Anna Haugh and Romy Gill create a meal in 20 minutes using ingredients provided by two sisters, one of whom has ulcerative colitis, which places limitations on her diet(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, featuring all the goals, analysis of the main talking points and post-match reaction from managers and players(n)

programme.title: Madly Madagascar
programme.desc: Love is in the air and adventures abound as Valentine's Day, the most romantic date on the calendar, arrives for the crew at the zoo. Animated spin-off from the Madagascar franchise, featuring the voices of Ben Stiller, Jada Pinkett Smith, Chris Rock and David Schwimmer(n)

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa (2008)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals discover a plane and, following a swift repair job by the penguins, manage to escape the desolate shores of Madagascar. However, they crash-land on the plains of Africa and find themselves face-to-face with their wild counterparts for the first time. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: Brave (2012)
programme.desc: A princess defies her mother's plans to secure peace by marrying her off to the son of one of their allies. A witch provides the rebellious royal with a magic spell to change her fate, but the enchantment backfires disastrously when the queen is transformed into a bear. Pixar's animated fantasy, with the voices of Kelly Macdonald, Emma Thompson and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: Catchpoint
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness hosts a family-friendly game show combining physical fun and an exciting question mechanic, as contestants have to think fast as they answer questions while trying to catch balls of various sizes dropped from the studio ceiling, with a variety of entertaining rounds and a cash prize at stake(n)

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present as famous faces take part in the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. Contestants include Kelly Cates, Adrian Chiles, Andy Hamilton, Kate Williams, Mark Dolan, Rustie Lee, Esther Rantzen and Tim Vine(n)

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Charlie has finally had enough and makes his feelings known about Jade and Jacob. Meanwhile, Ruby is forced to question her decision to give Harmony to her parents, but supportive words from Jan make her realise she has made the right choice, and Lev struggles to cope with Luka's chemotherapy. Starring Derek Thompson and Uriel Emil(n)

programme.title: All Round to Mrs Brown's
programme.desc: Mrs Brown's Boys creator, writer and star Brendan O'Carroll dons Agnes's famous cardigan and curly wig once again as he throws open the doors of the larger-than-life Irish matriarch's home to host the Saturday night chat show. In the second episode of the series, Agnes and the family are joined on the show by comedian and actor Lee Mack, actress and star of Silent Witness Emilia Fox and her mother, the actress Joanna David. Plus, a musical performance from the legendary singer-songwriter, Billy Ocean(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, featuring all the goals, analysis of the main talking points and post-match reaction from managers and players(n)

programme.title: Extras
programme.desc: David Bowie offers some home truths to Andy as he finally realises his dream of TV success. However, it soon becomes apparent to the former background artist that fame comes at a price and he is devastated to learn that stardom is not quite how he expected it to be. Starring Ricky Gervais and Ashley Jensen(n)

programme.title: Extras
programme.desc: Hoping to gain himself greater acting credibility, Andy takes a role in A Month of Summers, a play directed by Ian McKellen. However, he is shocked to discover the specifics of the production's plot. Meanwhile, Andy's agent Darren decides to ask Maggie out on a date, but things do not go to plan. Starring Ricky Gervais, Ashley Jensen and Stephen Merchant(n)

programme.title: Old School (2003)
programme.desc: An embittered lawyer decides to relive the wild, crazy days of his youth after his girlfriend is unfaithful, and enlists the help of two equally disillusioned friends in setting up a fraternity house next to his former college campus. Comedy, starring Luke Wilson, Will Ferrell, Vince Vaughn and Juliette Lewis(n)

programme.title: The Family Chase

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Gabriel and Aisha get closer when they work on a surgery together, threatening Ruby and Gabriel's blossoming relationship. Ruby and Ram fall out over a patient's care, while Edmund's search for his lost love hits a dead end. Medical drama, starring Amanda Redman, Amrita Acharia, James Krishna Floyd and Darshan Jariwalla, with a guest appearance by Kenneth Cranham(n)

programme.title: Belgravia
programme.desc: Anne and James are at loggerheads following the revelations at the Brockenhursts' party. With Oliver fixated on discovering the origins of his father's new protege, Susan uses the opportunity to plan a covert trip to meet with a new friend, and enlists her maid Speer to keep the true nature of the rendezvous under wraps. Meanwhile, Lady Templemore begins work on her lavish plans for her daughter's wedding, but much to her disappointment, Lady Maria seems fixated on someone other than her fiance(n)

programme.title: The Station: Trouble on the Tracks
programme.desc: The rail mobile detection team discovers a high-tech home - complete with electricity, running water and TV - illegally erected under an arch beside one of the country's busiest areas of track. At Euston, Transport Police officers are called upon when tempers flare - and deal with an unusual Royal request. Meanwhile, a strike hits Birmingham's New Street Station and the rail network on one of the busiest days of the year. With industrial action on West Midlands Trains, many passengers are left high and dry, and it's down to Network Rail to deliver the bad news(n)

programme.title: Out of Their Skin
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ian Wright charts the inspiring rise of black footballers in Britain, from Viv Anderson's debut as England's first senior black player in 1978, with the aid of archive footage, original interviews and a compilation of individual stories from the past and present. Contributors include Paul Ince, Ashley Cole, Les Ferdinand, John Barnes, Raheem Sterling and Marcus Rashford(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill introduces another rib-tickling collection of camcorder calamities and home-video howlers, featuring practical jokers, naughty animals, musical mishaps and holiday clips(n)

programme.title: Ibiza Weekender
programme.desc: Jordan contemplates his future as a rep as the season draws to a close, while David is keen to make sure the final weekend goes well(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Lois gets a job at Chris and Meg's school as a music teacher, but soon becomes the victim of a student's pranks(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter takes up smoking, and is quickly approached by an advertising executive who wants him to be the face of a new campaign - for an anti-smoking group. Meanwhile, Stepwise helps Chris battle some school bullies(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Reg is disappointed when Maureen does not buy him a birthday present. Jack tries to get Rodney to employ him as a singer in the bar, and Sean is arrested on suspicion of robbery(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des refuses to be Steve's witness against Sean. Audrey tells Alma about Martin's fling, and Steve blackmails Sean into accepting paying off his debt at £20 a week(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack returns home with Annie and Amos, Frank fusses over his grandson, and Biff announces he cannot be friends with Luke as long as he is with Tina(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack hurts his back and cannot attend Joe's funeral. Eric tries to worm his way into Caroline's good books, and Dave tells Kathy that he loves her and wants them to live together(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina struggles to cope with Phil's death and refuses Carol's offer to prescribe her sleeping pills, determined to deal with things on her own. However, with the funeral scheduled for the next day, an emotional service that sees the whole of Aidensfield turning out to say their farewells to the much-loved bobby, it seems the grieving landlady is expecting too much of herself. Over at the station, Don is racked with guilt over the shooting of his colleague, convinced he should have taken the bullet. Despite George's reassurances, the bobby believes the villagers will blame him for the death of a close friend and decides to pack his bags - until the sergeant makes him a proposition. Meanwhile, the officers investigate the suspected suicide of a local teacher and Carol fails to report an elderly motorist involved in a hit-and-run with a cyclist, which proves particularly embarrassing when the victim turns out to be the hospital's new doctor. Leon Ockenden joins the cast(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin is struggling to live off his student grant, so the girls find a way for him to earn hard cash. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The flatmates come up with a new rule to give their romantic pursuits a chance of privacy - but it means giving 24 hours' notice. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: While Angie's career in commercials goes from strength to strength, Ida fears that her son's marriage is growing weaker. Will Ida be able to stop herself interfering?(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A student is attacked on campus, and Jack takes time off from questioning two robbery suspects to catch the thug responsible before he can strike again. The trail leads him to Boxborough - where a confrontation with a belligerent solicitor provides the clue he needs to crack the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons, Charlotte Bellamy and Tazmin Malleson(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lesley Ashton (former Emmerdale actor Emma Atkins) arrives in Aidensfield looking for Don, and it is quickly clear that he is less than happy to see her, but despite his cool welcome she seems determined to make a new life for herself in the village. Elsewhere, Gina is pleased to be offered accommodation at the pub, Bernie receives a surprising offer from the recently widowed Iris Grocott and Ralph Spurling seeks Oscar's services as a private investigator after his house is broken into. Dominic Jephcott and Ann Mitchell guest star(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dave tells Biff that he does not know where he stands with Kathy. Sarah is worried about how Jack and Annie are coping with Joe's death(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Terry worries that Britt is having a breakdown. Zak announces his new plans for Dingle Enterprises, and Lady Weir tells Alan that Danny is her son(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Martin does not know where he stands with Gail. Rodney hosts a karaoke night at the Rovers, and Mike is shocked when he discovers his car is registered as stolen(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bet is flattered when Rodney calls on her with flowers, Mike puts his car up for sale, and Josie is stunned by Don's confession about the phone calls he made to Denise(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at baron Ned Fitzroy's wedding to Beth Porteous when the maid of honour is found pinned to the wall with a dagger. Meanwhile, Cully gets cold feet about tying the knot with Simon and is disappointed to learn the honeymoon to New Zealand will have to be cut short. With his own daughter's nuptials to attend, Barnaby races to unearth the family secrets he is sure lie behind the Fitzroy tragedy. Detective drama, starring John Nettles and Laura Howard(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lesley Ashton (former Emmerdale actor Emma Atkins) arrives in Aidensfield looking for Don, and it is quickly clear that he is less than happy to see her, but despite his cool welcome she seems determined to make a new life for herself in the village. Elsewhere, Gina is pleased to be offered accommodation at the pub, Bernie receives a surprising offer from the recently widowed Iris Grocott and Ralph Spurling seeks Oscar's services as a private investigator after his house is broken into. Dominic Jephcott and Ann Mitchell guest star(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A lavish dinner party proves to be a prelude to murder and intrigue - but fortunately Poirot is among the guests, and soon realises the key to the mystery lies in a duel fought 10 years previously. Drama, starring David Suchet, Caroline Langrishe and John McEnery(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Drama series, starring Martin Clunes as a surgeon who takes up a post in a sleepy Cornish village. Martin has to rush Buddy the dog to the vets. Meanwhile, Mrs Tishell's young cousin Sarah joins her for some work experience, but it does not go to plan, and one of Louisa's clients arrives at the surgery unannounced, posing a dilemma(n)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: In the final episode of this series, Martin rushes to Ruth's for a medical emergency, and preparations for Morwenna and Al's wedding do not go to plan. Elsewhere, Martin takes his final GMC assessment under the watchful eye of eminent surgeon Bernard Newton, who monitors Martin's skills in assisted surgery. Starring Martin Clunes, Tom Conti, Caroline Catz and Jessica Ransom(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: As Syndicate 9 investigates the discovery of a woman's body in a Manchester hotel room, Gill introduces Rachel to high-flying DS Will Pemberton, unaware they are already well acquainted - they've been having a passionate, secret relationship for months. But while the volatile copper can be discreet when it comes to romance, will she be able to hide her feelings when Gill lets slip that she wasn't the first choice for the sergeant's job? Meanwhile, Janet is keen to give her own love life a boost, especially after seeing how happy Ade is with his new partner Eleanor. However, a speed-dating event might not be the best option, as Janet finds herself treating each brief encounter like a police interrogation. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Amelia Bullmore, Steve Touissant and Mina Anwar(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A student is attacked on campus, and Jack takes time off from questioning two robbery suspects to catch the thug responsible before he can strike again. The trail leads him to Boxborough - where a confrontation with a belligerent solicitor provides the clue he needs to crack the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons, Charlotte Bellamy and Tazmin Malleson(n)

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Ruby becomes personally involved in the case of an abandoned baby that is brought to the hospital during the Holi festival, and Lydia is reunited with an expat artist, whose unusual lifestyle may be about to catch up with him. Medical drama set in coastal town in tropical South India, starring Amrita Acharia and Amanda Redman(n)

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Ram clashes with Lydia as a medical case becomes personal on the day he is due to attend a lavish wedding. Ruby treats a patient from the UK whose story does not add up, and the experience leaves her wondering where she really belongs(n)

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: While Angie's career in commercials goes from strength to strength, Ida fears that her son's marriage is growing weaker. Will Ida be able to stop herself interfering?(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Tommy Hicks of the Midsomer Yeomanry finally has his name added to the Midsomer Parva war memorial, though he was shot for cowardice at the Somme in the First World War. It becomes apparent that time has not healed the rift between his descendants and the residents of Hammond Hall, whose patriarch Duggie Hammond pulled the trigger on his comrade all those years ago. A drink-fuelled mock trial of retired colonel Henry Hammond leads to a killing, and Tom Barnaby has to unravel the tangle of bitterness linking property developer Dave Hicks's brood with their neighbours. Drama, guest starring Donald Sinden and George Cole, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The owner of local country magazine Midsomer Life becomes a suspect when a man's body is discovered in woodland, and it is established the victim had been having an affair with his wife. As Barnaby and Jones delve into the case, another murder forces them to reassess their inquiries. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Simon Williams(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. While Barnaby and Jones begin their investigations, tempers flare in the local community between Ernest, a firm believer in a mystical cult, and his former friend Aloysius - whose background in the jungles of South America makes him the prime suspect for the murder. Starring John Nettles, Ronald Pickup and Stuart Wilson(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Musicians compete for a prestigious award at the annual Thassingham Classical Music Festival - and Barnaby and Winter are called in when the winner is brutally murdered and his priceless violin is stolen. Suspicion rapidly falls on the maestro organising the festival (James Fleet), who had planned to debut his new composition at the event and has stirred up resentment by turning a community festival into a corporate one - while many suspect that the murder is the result of a curse. However, a drunken viola player (Simon Callow) turns out to have some dark secrets that may implicate him in the crime(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A disused abbey that is believed to be cursed is about to be turned into a pub, a decision that has angered many superstitious locals - not to mention the real ale society. The day after the launch night, the curse appears to have claimed a victim - a body is found boiled to death in a kettle of beer, in a manner very similar to an infamous execution on the site in the 16th century. Elaine Paige guest stars, while Annette Badland joins the cast as new pathologist Fleur Perkins(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: With their friendship in tatters, the lack of communication between Rachel and Janet is making even the simplest of tasks difficult, and it takes a call about Gill's possible abduction to reunite them as a team. The duo soon have Gill's car in their sights and identify the kidnapper, but discover they are heading for a notorious suicide location. Can the detectives get to their boss in time?(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A vulnerable young man is reported missing by his pub landlord boss. Syndicate 9 suspect Robin McKendrick may have been killed after a photo of him bound and gagged in a car boot appears online. However, the case takes an unusual turn when a body found in a flooded quarry turns out to be a woman's corpse. Meanwhile, battle-scarred from their conflict last year, Scott and Bailey are determined to move forward with honesty. The pair find themselves in front of the promotion board and pass with flying colours, leaving Gill with the task of choosing who stays on as sergeant at the department. Danny Webb joins a cast led by Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: Great Estates of Scotland
programme.desc: A tour of the Rosslyn Estate on the outskirts of Edinburgh, which has been connected to both biblical stories and reports of alien landings(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's former CID colleague Jack Colby left the force under a cloud following a sex scandal involving villagers and officers at Causton police station. Now retrained as a probation officer, Jack is working at a halfway house for reformed criminals, so when he is bludgeoned to death the detective sets out to discover why the past would not leave him alone. With Chris Barrie, Edward Petherbridge, Sue Jenkins, Nigel Harrison and Christopher Fairbank(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at baron Ned Fitzroy's wedding to Beth Porteous when the maid of honour is found pinned to the wall with a dagger. Meanwhile, Cully gets cold feet about tying the knot with Simon and is disappointed to learn the honeymoon to New Zealand will have to be cut short. With his own daughter's nuptials to attend, Barnaby races to unearth the family secrets he is sure lie behind the Fitzroy tragedy. Detective drama, starring John Nettles and Laura Howard(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth helps an old friend find refuge at country house Greenshaw's Folly, but a sinister shadow falls over the strange building's various inhabitants and a murderer strikes. Miss Marple uncovers secrets from the past about Miss Greenshaw as a dangerous storm gathers and the bodies start to pile up. Julia McKenzie heads an all-star cast that includes Jim Moir (better known as Vic Reeves), Kimberley Nixon, Fiona Shaw, Robert Glenister, Julia Sawalha, Judy Parfitt and Matt Willis (formerly of pop group Busted)(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As plans to build a new police station lead Morse to question his place in the force, he investigates the case of Tommy Cork, a boy from a broken home who has disappeared. Meanwhile, the body of disreputable journalist Eric Patterson has been found on railway tracks in mysterious circumstances. He was last seen embroiled in an argument with a council official about a company preparing to redevelop the site of Blenheim Vale, a disused correctional facility for boys. When a petty criminal with a connection to Blenheim absconds from an open prison, it sets off a chain reaction of events that threaten to expose horrors of the past. Did missing Tommy witness something that cost him his life?(n)

programme.title: Larry Grayson: Shut That Door!
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the entertainer's rise from poverty to fame, drawing on extracts from an unfinished autobiography. Featuring contributions from friends and colleagues including Michael Barrymore, Janet Street-Porter, Chris Tarrant and Generation Game co-host Isla St Clair(n)

programme.title: Ant & Dec's DNA Journey
programme.desc: Part two of two. Anthony McPartlin and Declan Donnelly embark on a journey to New York to follow the bloodlines of their mothers using DNA analysis and genealogy. There is a surprise for Dec as he finds out he has close family he never knew existed, while Ant's history takes him to the United Nations. After a whirlwind tour of the US, it's back to Ireland to investigate a family secret that Ant's family has been trying to unlock for years(n)

programme.title: The Syndicate
programme.desc: Bob is left reeling after the result of his brain scan, forcing him to re-evaluate his life and deal with problems that no amount of money can solve. But as he awaits a second opinion, his colleagues seek help on the internet and discover a possible cure overseas for their beloved manager. The brothers come under increasing pressure as the police investigation into the robbery continues, but while Jamie is convinced he is untouchable after his lottery win, Stuart is not so sure. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Matthew McNulty and Matthew Lewis(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Syndicate 9 find themselves dealing with a high-profile historical case after Mandy Sweeting's body is recovered from a quarry, 23 years after she was first reported missing. However, Rachel's biggest challenge might not be dealing with the media attention or even re-interviewing bereft family members, but hiding her contempt for Rob Waddington's father Frankie (former Coronation Street star Ian Mercer), who led the original investigation. Meanwhile, Janet also has problems to deal with at home, as Elise moves in with her dad and his new girlfriend. But at least it inspires the detective to look at her own love life, as she confides in Rachel that she's started using dating sites. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Danny Miller(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Tommy Hicks of the Midsomer Yeomanry finally has his name added to the Midsomer Parva war memorial, though he was shot for cowardice at the Somme in the First World War. It becomes apparent that time has not healed the rift between his descendants and the residents of Hammond Hall, whose patriarch Duggie Hammond pulled the trigger on his comrade all those years ago. A drink-fuelled mock trial of retired colonel Henry Hammond leads to a killing, and Tom Barnaby has to unravel the tangle of bitterness linking property developer Dave Hicks's brood with their neighbours. Drama, guest starring Donald Sinden and George Cole, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The owner of local country magazine Midsomer Life becomes a suspect when a man's body is discovered in woodland, and it is established the victim had been having an affair with his wife. As Barnaby and Jones delve into the case, another murder forces them to reassess their inquiries. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Simon Williams(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A magician's assistant drops dead on stage, poisoned by the toxins from a tropical frog. While Barnaby and Jones begin their investigations, tempers flare in the local community between Ernest, a firm believer in a mystical cult, and his former friend Aloysius - whose background in the jungles of South America makes him the prime suspect for the murder. Starring John Nettles, Ronald Pickup and Stuart Wilson(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Musicians compete for a prestigious award at the annual Thassingham Classical Music Festival - and Barnaby and Winter are called in when the winner is brutally murdered and his priceless violin is stolen. Suspicion rapidly falls on the maestro organising the festival (James Fleet), who had planned to debut his new composition at the event and has stirred up resentment by turning a community festival into a corporate one - while many suspect that the murder is the result of a curse. However, a drunken viola player (Simon Callow) turns out to have some dark secrets that may implicate him in the crime(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A disused abbey that is believed to be cursed is about to be turned into a pub, a decision that has angered many superstitious locals - not to mention the real ale society. The day after the launch night, the curse appears to have claimed a victim - a body is found boiled to death in a kettle of beer, in a manner very similar to an infamous execution on the site in the 16th century. Elaine Paige guest stars, while Annette Badland joins the cast as new pathologist Fleur Perkins(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: With their friendship in tatters, the lack of communication between Rachel and Janet is making even the simplest of tasks difficult, and it takes a call about Gill's possible abduction to reunite them as a team. The duo soon have Gill's car in their sights and identify the kidnapper, but discover they are heading for a notorious suicide location. Can the detectives get to their boss in time?(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A vulnerable young man is reported missing by his pub landlord boss. Syndicate 9 suspect Robin McKendrick may have been killed after a photo of him bound and gagged in a car boot appears online. However, the case takes an unusual turn when a body found in a flooded quarry turns out to be a woman's corpse. Meanwhile, battle-scarred from their conflict last year, Scott and Bailey are determined to move forward with honesty. The pair find themselves in front of the promotion board and pass with flying colours, leaving Gill with the task of choosing who stays on as sergeant at the department. Danny Webb joins a cast led by Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones(n)

programme.title: Great Estates of Scotland
programme.desc: A tour of the Rosslyn Estate on the outskirts of Edinburgh, which has been connected to both biblical stories and reports of alien landings(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's former CID colleague Jack Colby left the force under a cloud following a sex scandal involving villagers and officers at Causton police station. Now retrained as a probation officer, Jack is working at a halfway house for reformed criminals, so when he is bludgeoned to death the detective sets out to discover why the past would not leave him alone. With Chris Barrie, Edward Petherbridge, Sue Jenkins, Nigel Harrison and Christopher Fairbank(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at baron Ned Fitzroy's wedding to Beth Porteous when the maid of honour is found pinned to the wall with a dagger. Meanwhile, Cully gets cold feet about tying the knot with Simon and is disappointed to learn the honeymoon to New Zealand will have to be cut short. With his own daughter's nuptials to attend, Barnaby races to unearth the family secrets he is sure lie behind the Fitzroy tragedy. Detective drama, starring John Nettles and Laura Howard(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth helps an old friend find refuge at country house Greenshaw's Folly, but a sinister shadow falls over the strange building's various inhabitants and a murderer strikes. Miss Marple uncovers secrets from the past about Miss Greenshaw as a dangerous storm gathers and the bodies start to pile up. Julia McKenzie heads an all-star cast that includes Jim Moir (better known as Vic Reeves), Kimberley Nixon, Fiona Shaw, Robert Glenister, Julia Sawalha, Judy Parfitt and Matt Willis (formerly of pop group Busted)(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As plans to build a new police station lead Morse to question his place in the force, he investigates the case of Tommy Cork, a boy from a broken home who has disappeared. Meanwhile, the body of disreputable journalist Eric Patterson has been found on railway tracks in mysterious circumstances. He was last seen embroiled in an argument with a council official about a company preparing to redevelop the site of Blenheim Vale, a disused correctional facility for boys. When a petty criminal with a connection to Blenheim absconds from an open prison, it sets off a chain reaction of events that threaten to expose horrors of the past. Did missing Tommy witness something that cost him his life?(n)

programme.title: Larry Grayson: Shut That Door!
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the entertainer's rise from poverty to fame, drawing on extracts from an unfinished autobiography. Featuring contributions from friends and colleagues including Michael Barrymore, Janet Street-Porter, Chris Tarrant and Generation Game co-host Isla St Clair(n)

programme.title: Ant & Dec's DNA Journey
programme.desc: Part two of two. Anthony McPartlin and Declan Donnelly embark on a journey to New York to follow the bloodlines of their mothers using DNA analysis and genealogy. There is a surprise for Dec as he finds out he has close family he never knew existed, while Ant's history takes him to the United Nations. After a whirlwind tour of the US, it's back to Ireland to investigate a family secret that Ant's family has been trying to unlock for years(n)

programme.title: The Syndicate
programme.desc: Bob is left reeling after the result of his brain scan, forcing him to re-evaluate his life and deal with problems that no amount of money can solve. But as he awaits a second opinion, his colleagues seek help on the internet and discover a possible cure overseas for their beloved manager. The brothers come under increasing pressure as the police investigation into the robbery continues, but while Jamie is convinced he is untouchable after his lottery win, Stuart is not so sure. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Matthew McNulty and Matthew Lewis(n)

programme.title: Tommy Cooper
programme.desc: Arthur Lowe guests as an uptight censor, trying to keep a tight rein on the tricks and jokes. With Sheena Marsh, Frank Coda and John Lord(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The LA punk rock scene comes under the spotlight when a teenage boy is murdered in a club while dancing to lyrics about death and violence(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo agonises over whether to accept the offer of a job with a leading law firm, when a series of recent drug-related deaths begins to overshadow his decision(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Nightclub owner Paul Verrier is tricked into believing that the Saint is trying to kill him, so contacts various people to murder Templer. One of his nefarious contacts is unknown to him visually, so when the Saint eventually pays a call Verrier mistakes him for his hired assassin and inadvertently hires the Saint to kill himself. Roger Moore stars(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry is pleased when villainous old friend Jack ''Oily' Wragg returns to England, However, his pleasure melts away when he learns that there are old scores to settle and that Wragg intends to stage one final heist. Light-hearted crime drama, guest starring Pete Postlethwaite, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A stakeout in a bowling alley escalates into a full-scale alert when an atom bomb is discovered, primed and ready to detonate. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star in an instalment featuring a fleeting early appearance by Pamela Stephenson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Suspected felon Billy Medhurst returns from Spain, and Regan determines to prove his involvement in an earlier robbery in which a Sweeney office was shot and left permanently disabled. Police drama, starring John Thaw, Dennis Waterman and Anthony Heaton(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A hostage is shot during an attempted armed robbery at a bank - and Quincy gets the job of defending the policeman who pulled the trigger(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates the case of a surgeon in desperate need of money to pay off enormous gambling debts. The physician is breaking the law by recommending to his patients they undergo expensive and unnecessary operations at risk to their own lives - while thugs pressure the families of the victims to pay for the dangerous treatment(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Counterfeiters lead Simon a merry dance from London to Switzerland via Paris, and the involvement of a bogus countess only complicates matters further. Roger Moore stars, with Kate O'Mara and Philip Madoc(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is held by the police after a car he is importing from Europe is impounded by drugs officers, so Terry goes in search of those he suspects are responsible for his boss' predicament - the vehicle's original owners. Light-hearted crime drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle learn an assassin has been hired to murder one of the delegates at an anti-terrorist conference and set about discovering the identity of the killer's target. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is joined by an old friend - Turkish policeman Captain Shebbeq - to help him track down a gold-smuggling ring. As he observes a secret government deal to transport the precious commodity, he comes to suspect there is something rather sinister also within the cargo. Nadim Sawalha guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants before John, Alix, Helen and Benjamin pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In an earlier investigation, Jeremy Wade was propelled into an Indian river by a goonch catfish as big as himself, yet managed to land the rare beast after an epic battle. Ten years on, Jeremy hears a report from neighbouring Nepal of a mysterious attack that sounds strangely familiar - a lone fisherman on a mountain river dragged off his feet and into the water by an unseen creature. The extreme angler contemplates whether the original river monster could be back, and sets off to find out(n)

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey(n)

programme.desc: Arthur spots a potential darts champion and enters him in a contest, where he duly gets nobbled. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.desc: Special programme looking at the current outbreak of coronavirus in the UK by exploring how viruses - as well as other germs - are transmitted. programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Helen Skelton and Alex Langlands visit Sherwood Forest to learn more about the legend of Robin Hood - who may or may not have been real - and King John, who definitely was. An archaeological team digs the land surrounding the ruins of King John's palace at Clipstone in the heart of the forest, hoping to reveal how far the royal buildings stretched. Helen and Alex also visit several of Robin Hood's supposed hideouts, as well as Nottingham Castle, where he is reputed to have been imprisoned before escaping via a secret tunnel(n)

As the story begins, the celebs are invited to the reading of the Baroness Grafton's will. Surrounded by the late woman's loved ones, it's clear that some are happier with their lot than others. programme.desc: The singer uncovers a little-known cruise route in the Great Lakes of America and Canada. Jane later visits the natural wonder that is Niagara Falls. Not satisfied with being drenched by the sheer force of the waterfalls, she opts to take an adrenalin-pumping zip-line across the falls. programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary looking at how the German supermarket has succeeded in the UK, overcoming industry hostility and old-fashioned snobbery to win the public over with its discounted goods. Former staff reveal how Aldi has overcome shoppers' suspicions using a host of clever techniques to cut costs, from multiple barcodes and less time spent at the tills, to their own-brand products - which are intended to look and taste like their big-name counterparts, but cost a fraction of the price(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence(n)

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Lincolnshire landowner Robert Elwes, his archaeologist wife Marina and daughter Emily, swap homes, budgets and lives with Yorkshire family Siobhan and Andy Leckenby and their children Kacey-Leigh, Oscar and Poppy(n)

programme.title: 13 Moments...
programme.desc: An extraordinary musician with an unforgettable voice, Amy Winehouse's meteoric rise saw her blossom into a truly global star who changed the landscape of modern pop culture. However, the world also witnessed her drug and alcohol addiction, dramatic weight loss and involvement in a destructive relationship. These factors led to her premature death in July 2011, aged 27. This film features contributions from some of those who knew Amy well and those who tried to help her, telling the story of a towering but troubled talent, through the chain of key moments that led ultimately towards tragedy(n)

programme.title: The Ten Faces of Michael Jackson
programme.desc: Speculation surrounding the facial cosmetic procedures that Michael Jackson may have had were rife in his lifetime, but details of the singer's autopsy revealed how much plastic surgery he actually underwent, and when. This documentary presents an analysis of the 10 'different' faces Jackson had over the years, using CGI rendering to highlight the changes as well as depict what he may have looked like had he not undergone any procedures. Featuring interviews with his sister Latoya, friend Mark Lester and stylist Steve Erhardt(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
